message:
refactor: remove unused HookInstallerFunc registry (gt-071h)

Remove RegisterHookInstaller, GetHookInstaller, HookInstallerFunc, and
ResetHookInstallersForTesting from config/agents.go. These are no longer
needed — the generic installer in internal/hooks/ reads directly from
preset metadata and embedded templates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
